title: ProofMeta Manifest
description: Published by a Provider Agent at /.well-known/proofmeta.json

id.description: Unique identifier for this provider. Can be a DID, URL, or API key-based ID.

name.description: Human-readable name of the provider agent

description.description: Optional description of what this provider offers

catalog_endpoint.description: Optional endpoint for browsing available items

request_endpoint.description: Endpoint where Consumer Agents POST license requests

status_endpoint.description: Endpoint where Consumer Agents GET license request status

payment.description: Supported payment resolvers e.g. stripe, lightning, erc20

delivery.description: Supported delivery methods e.g. https, ipfs, arweave

verification.description: Supported verification methods e.g. signed-jwt, erc721

terms_url.description: URL to the full license text

terms_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the license text for integrity verification

amount.description: Indicative price as string e.g. '5.00' or '0'

currency.description: Currency code e.g. USD, EUR, BTC

scope.description: Simple string tags describing what this license permits e.g. commercial, non-commercial, attribution-required, ai-training-excluded
